message:
fix(llm): deduplicate LLMProvider type and fix Ollama availability check

- Remove duplicate LLMProvider type from llm.ts; import from types.ts
  as single source of truth to prevent future divergence
- Fix isLLMAvailable("ollama") to also check OLLAMA_HOST env var, not
  just OLLAMA_BASE_URL — this makes the fallback chain include Ollama
  when it's configured via standard Ollama env vars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
